text: {"reason": "The draft correctly asserts only allowed facts: that Novig is peer-to-peer (matching against other users, not a house). It appropriately hedges the specific matching rules (price-time priority, simultaneous order handling) by saying \"I can't confirm\" rather than asserting them as fact. It does not promise outcomes, confirm disputed figures, or assert off-list fees/limits/rules as existing.", "violates": false}
